subcodes.title: Words to Madam J, spoken on 1904-04-15
subcodes.first_line: Yes, I know, and the more you think to know the reason the less you can solve the problem... Man erroneously thinks his happiness comes from the world
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @suffering and imprisonment, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @human reality created in the image of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
